mux2

 O=(A&~S)|(B&S)

generated netlist

# mux2  —  O=(A&~S)|(B&S)
PORTS in: A, B, S
PORTS out: O
INST not_s   : not       A=S O=Sn
INST and_a   : and       A=A B=Sn O=na
INST and_b   : and       A=B B=S O=nb
INST or_o    : or        A=na B=nb O=O
NET  Sn na nb

BUFGCTRL

 UG572 Fig 2-5

generated netlist

# BUFGCTRL  —  UG572 Fig 2-5
PORTS in: I0, I1, S0, S1, CE0, CE1, IGNORE0, IGNORE1
PORTS out: O
INST and0    : and       A=S0 B=CE0 O=g0
INST lat0    : latch_d   D=g0 G=~I0 Q=l0
INST ig0     : mux2      A=l0 B=g0 S=IGNORE0 O=sel0
INST a0      : and       A=I0 B=sel0 O=a0n
INST and1    : and       A=S1 B=CE1 O=g1
INST lat1    : latch_d   D=g1 G=~I1 Q=l1
INST ig1     : mux2      A=l1 B=g1 S=IGNORE1 O=sel1
INST a1      : and       A=I1 B=sel1 O=a1n
INST oro     : or        A=a0n B=a1n O=O
NET  g0 l0 sel0 a0n g1 l1 sel1 a1n
# array: 24 BUFGCE + 8 BUFGCTRL + 4 BUFGCE_DIV / clock region

NET  ni ceg

# BUFG_GT_SYNC  —  UG572 Fig 2-21
PORTS in: CLK, CE, CLR
PORTS out: CESYNC, CLRSYNC
INST ce0     : dff_d     D=CE CLK=CLK Q=ce_s0
INST ce1     : dff_d     D=ce_s0 CLK=CLK Q=CESYNC
INST clr0    : dff_d     D=CLR CLK=CLK Q=clr_s0
INST clr1    : dff_d     D=clr_s0 CLK=CLK Q=CLRSYNC
NET  ce_s0 clr_s0

div_prog

 UG572 Eq 3-1/3-2 (M/D/O counters)

generated netlist

# div_prog  —  UG572 Eq 3-1/3-2 (M/D/O counters)
PORTS in: CLK, RST
PORTS out: O
INST cfg_0   : cfgcell   Q=DIVCFG[0]
INST cfg_1   : cfgcell   Q=DIVCFG[1]
INST cfg_2   : cfgcell   Q=DIVCFG[2]
INST cfg_3   : cfgcell   Q=DIVCFG[3]
INST cfg_4   : cfgcell   Q=DIVCFG[4]
INST cfg_5   : cfgcell   Q=DIVCFG[5]
INST cfg_6   : cfgcell   Q=DIVCFG[6]
INST eq_0    : xnor      A=Q[0] B=DIVCFG[0] O=eq[0]
INST eq_1    : xnor      A=Q[1] B=DIVCFG[1] O=eq[1]
INST eq_2    : xnor      A=Q[2] B=DIVCFG[2] O=eq[2]
INST eq_3    : xnor      A=Q[3] B=DIVCFG[3] O=eq[3]
INST eq_4    : xnor      A=Q[4] B=DIVCFG[4] O=eq[4]
INST eq_5    : xnor      A=Q[5] B=DIVCFG[5] O=eq[5]
INST eq_6    : xnor      A=Q[6] B=DIVCFG[6] O=eq[6]
INST tc_1    : and       A=eq[0] B=eq[1] O=tc[1]
INST tc_2    : and       A=tc[1] B=eq[2] O=tc[2]
INST tc_3    : and       A=tc[2] B=eq[3] O=tc[3]
INST tc_4    : and       A=tc[3] B=eq[4] O=tc[4]
INST tc_5    : and       A=tc[4] B=eq[5] O=tc[5]
INST tc_6    : and       A=tc[5] B=eq[6] O=tc[6]
INST rsto    : or        A=RST B=tc[6] O=rst_eff
INST nrst    : not       A=rst_eff O=nrst
INST cin_1   : and       A=1 B=Q[0] O=cin[1]
INST cin_2   : and       A=cin[1] B=Q[1] O=cin[2]
INST cin_3   : and       A=cin[2] B=Q[2] O=cin[3]
INST cin_4   : and       A=cin[3] B=Q[3] O=cin[4]
INST cin_5   : and       A=cin[4] B=Q[4] O=cin[5]
INST cin_6   : and       A=cin[5] B=Q[5] O=cin[6]
INST xr_0    : xor       A=Q[0] B=1 O=nxt[0]
INST xr_1    : xor       A=Q[1] B=cin[1] O=nxt[1]
INST xr_2    : xor       A=Q[2] B=cin[2] O=nxt[2]
INST xr_3    : xor       A=Q[3] B=cin[3] O=nxt[3]
INST xr_4    : xor       A=Q[4] B=cin[4] O=nxt[4]
INST xr_5    : xor       A=Q[5] B=cin[5] O=nxt[5]
INST xr_6    : xor       A=Q[6] B=cin[6] O=nxt[6]
INST da_0    : and       A=nxt[0] B=nrst O=d[0]
INST da_1    : and       A=nxt[1] B=nrst O=d[1]
INST da_2    : and       A=nxt[2] B=nrst O=d[2]
INST da_3    : and       A=nxt[3] B=nrst O=d[3]
INST da_4    : and       A=nxt[4] B=nrst O=d[4]
INST da_5    : and       A=nxt[5] B=nrst O=d[5]
INST da_6    : and       A=nxt[6] B=nrst O=d[6]
INST ff_0    : dff_d     D=d[0] CLK=CLK Q=Q[0]
INST ff_1    : dff_d     D=d[1] CLK=CLK Q=Q[1]
INST ff_2    : dff_d     D=d[2] CLK=CLK Q=Q[2]
INST ff_3    : dff_d     D=d[3] CLK=CLK Q=Q[3]
INST ff_4    : dff_d     D=d[4] CLK=CLK Q=Q[4]
INST ff_5    : dff_d     D=d[5] CLK=CLK Q=Q[5]
INST ff_6    : dff_d     D=d[6] CLK=CLK Q=Q[6]
INST otog    : xor       A=O B=tc[6] O=otog
INST off     : dff_d     D=otog CLK=CLK Q=O
NET  Q eq tc cin nxt d rst_eff nrst otog

BUFGCE_DIV

 UG572 Table 2-8

generated netlist

# BUFGCE_DIV  —  UG572 Table 2-8
PORTS in: I, CE, CLR
PORTS out: O
INST gate    : BUFGCE    I=I CE=CE O=gi
INST dv      : div_prog  CLK=gi RST=CLR O=O
NET  gi
# array: 4 BUFGCE_DIV / clock region

BUFG_GT

 UG572 Fig 2-21

generated netlist

# BUFG_GT  —  UG572 Fig 2-21
PORTS in: I, CE, CEMASK, CLR, CLRMASK, DIV[0], DIV[1], DIV[2]
PORTS out: O
INST cem     : or        A=CE B=CEMASK O=ce_eff
INST ncm     : not       A=CLRMASK O=nclrm
INST clm     : and       A=CLR B=nclrm O=clr_eff
INST sync    : BUFG_GT_SYNC CLK=I CE=ce_eff CLR=clr_eff CESYNC=cesync CLRSYNC=clrsync
INST gate    : BUFGCE    I=I CE=cesync O=gi
INST dv      : div_prog  CLK=gi RST=clrsync O=O
NET  ce_eff nclrm clr_eff cesync clrsync gi
# array: 24 BUFG_GT + 14 BUFG_GT_SYNC / GT Quad (UltraScale+)

# MMCME4_BASE  —  UG572 Fig 3-2/Table 3-1 (UG974 MMCME4_BASE)
PORTS in: CLKIN1, CLKFBIN, RST, PWRDWN
PORTS out: CLKOUT0, CLKOUT1, CLKOUT2, CLKOUT3, CLKOUT4, CLKOUT5, CLKOUT6, CLKOUT0B, CLKOUT1B, CLKOUT2B, CLKOUT3B, CLKFBOUT, CLKFBOUTB, LOCKED
INST dd      : div_prog  CLK=CLKIN1 RST=RST O=clkin_d
INST pf      : pfd       CLKREF=clkin_d CLKFB=CLKFBIN UP=up DN=dn
INST cp      : charge_pump UP=up DN=dn VCTRL=vctrl
INST vc      : vco       VCTRL=vctrl CLK=vcoclk
INST ld      : lock_det  UP=up DN=dn LOCKED=LOCKED
INST o0      : div_prog  CLK=vcoclk RST=RST O=CLKOUT0
INST o1      : div_prog  CLK=vcoclk RST=RST O=CLKOUT1
INST o2      : div_prog  CLK=vcoclk RST=RST O=CLKOUT2
INST o3      : div_prog  CLK=vcoclk RST=RST O=CLKOUT3
INST o4      : div_prog  CLK=vcoclk RST=RST O=CLKOUT4
INST o5      : div_prog  CLK=vcoclk RST=RST O=CLKOUT5
INST o6      : div_prog  CLK=vcoclk RST=RST O=CLKOUT6
INST mm      : div_prog  CLK=vcoclk RST=RST O=CLKFBOUT
INST b_CLKOUT0B: not       A=CLKOUT0 O=CLKOUT0B
INST b_CLKOUT1B: not       A=CLKOUT1 O=CLKOUT1B
INST b_CLKOUT2B: not       A=CLKOUT2 O=CLKOUT2B
INST b_CLKOUT3B: not       A=CLKOUT3 O=CLKOUT3B
INST b_CLKFBOUTB: not       A=CLKFBOUT O=CLKFBOUTB
NET  clkin_d up dn vctrl vcoclk
# array: 1 MMCM / CMT

# PLLE4_BASE  —  UG974 PLLE4_BASE
PORTS in: CLKIN, CLKFBIN, RST, PWRDWN, CLKOUTPHYEN
PORTS out: CLKOUT0, CLKOUT0B, CLKOUT1, CLKOUT1B, CLKFBOUT, CLKOUTPHY, LOCKED
INST dd      : div_prog  CLK=CLKIN RST=RST O=clkin_d
INST pf      : pfd       CLKREF=clkin_d CLKFB=CLKFBIN UP=up DN=dn
INST cp      : charge_pump UP=up DN=dn VCTRL=vctrl
INST vc      : vco       VCTRL=vctrl CLK=vcoclk
INST ld      : lock_det  UP=up DN=dn LOCKED=LOCKED
INST o0      : div_prog  CLK=vcoclk RST=RST O=CLKOUT0
INST o1      : div_prog  CLK=vcoclk RST=RST O=CLKOUT1
INST mm      : div_prog  CLK=vcoclk RST=RST O=CLKFBOUT
INST b_CLKOUT0B: not       A=CLKOUT0 O=CLKOUT0B
INST b_CLKOUT1B: not       A=CLKOUT1 O=CLKOUT1B
INST op      : div_prog  CLK=vcoclk RST=RST O=phyraw
INST pg      : and       A=phyraw B=CLKOUTPHYEN O=CLKOUTPHY
NET  clkin_d up dn vctrl vcoclk phyraw
# array: 2 PLL / CMT

generated netlist

# CARRY8  —  UG574 CARRY8 (MUXCY+XOR ripple; CI_TOP split)
PORTS in: CI, CI_TOP, DI[0], DI[1], DI[2], DI[3], DI[4], DI[5], DI[6], DI[7], S[0], S[1], S[2], S[3], S[4], S[5], S[6], S[7]
PORTS out: O[0], O[1], O[2], O[3], O[4], O[5], O[6], O[7], CO[0], CO[1], CO[2], CO[3], CO[4], CO[5], CO[6], CO[7]
INST split   : cfgcell   Q=SPLIT
INST topmux  : mux2      A=co[3] B=CI_TOP S=SPLIT O=ci4
INST x0      : xor       A=S[0] B=CI O=O[0]
INST m0      : mux2      A=DI[0] B=CI S=S[0] O=co[0]
INST cob0    : buf       A=co[0] O=CO[0]
INST x1      : xor       A=S[1] B=co[0] O=O[1]
INST m1      : mux2      A=DI[1] B=co[0] S=S[1] O=co[1]
INST cob1    : buf       A=co[1] O=CO[1]
INST x2      : xor       A=S[2] B=co[1] O=O[2]
INST m2      : mux2      A=DI[2] B=co[1] S=S[2] O=co[2]
INST cob2    : buf       A=co[2] O=CO[2]
INST x3      : xor       A=S[3] B=co[2] O=O[3]
INST m3      : mux2      A=DI[3] B=co[2] S=S[3] O=co[3]
INST cob3    : buf       A=co[3] O=CO[3]
INST x4      : xor       A=S[4] B=ci4 O=O[4]
INST m4      : mux2      A=DI[4] B=ci4 S=S[4] O=co[4]
INST cob4    : buf       A=co[4] O=CO[4]
INST x5      : xor       A=S[5] B=co[4] O=O[5]
INST m5      : mux2      A=DI[5] B=co[4] S=S[5] O=co[5]
INST cob5    : buf       A=co[5] O=CO[5]
INST x6      : xor       A=S[6] B=co[5] O=O[6]
INST m6      : mux2      A=DI[6] B=co[5] S=S[6] O=co[6]
INST cob6    : buf       A=co[6] O=CO[6]
INST x7      : xor       A=S[7] B=co[6] O=O[7]
INST m7      : mux2      A=DI[7] B=co[6] S=S[7] O=co[7]
INST cob7    : buf       A=co[7] O=CO[7]
NET  co ci4 SPLIT

INST mx3_0   : mux2      A=t2_0 B=t2_1 S=s3 O=t3_0
INST mx3_1   : mux2      A=t2_2 B=t2_2 S=s3 O=t3_1
INST mx4_0   : mux2      A=t3_0 B=t3_1 S=s4 O=t4_0
INST ob      : buf       A=t4_0 O=CLKOUT
NET  s0 s1 s2 s3 s4 t0_0 t0_1 t0_2 t0_3 t0_4 t0_5 t0_6 t0_7 t0_8 t0_9 t0_10 t0_11 t1_0 t1_1 t1_2 t1_3 t1_4 t1_5 t2_0 t2_1 t2_2 t3_0 t3_1 t4_0

clk_pip

 UG572 Ch1-2 clock routing PIP - config-mux selecting a track driver (drive-rule fabric per Agent D findings).

generated netlist

# clk_pip  —  UG572 Ch1-2 clock routing PIP - config-mux selecting a track driver (drive-rule fabric per Agent D findings).
PORTS in: I0, I1
PORTS out: O
INST sel_cfg : cfgcell   Q=sel
INST pip_mux : mux2      A=I0 B=I1 S=sel O=O
NET  sel

clock_switch

 UG572 Fig 3-8 clock input switchover. NOTE: CLKINSEL polarity not given in UG572 p58; mux selects CLKIN1 when CLKINSEL=1, CLKIN2 when CLKINSEL=0.

generated netlist

# clock_switch  —  UG572 Fig 3-8 clock input switchover. NOTE: CLKINSEL polarity not given in UG572 p58; mux selects CLKIN1 when CLKINSEL=1, CLKIN2 when CLKINSEL=0.
PORTS in: CLKIN1, CLKIN2, CLKINSEL, CLKFBIN
PORTS out: CLKIN, CLKINSTOPPED, CLKFBSTOPPED
INST sel_mux : mux2      A=CLKIN2 B=CLKIN1 S=CLKINSEL O=CLKIN
INST clkin_stop: clk_stop_det CLK=CLKIN STOPPED=CLKINSTOPPED
INST clkfb_stop: clk_stop_det CLK=CLKFBIN STOPPED=CLKFBSTOPPED

div_prog_frac

 UG572 Fig 3-1/3-24 fractional divider, 1/8 resolution. div_prog supplies the integer-divided clock O; a 3-bit phase accumulator (acc += FRAC each O edge) exposes its carry as FRAC_CARRY at the boundary (the +1/8 step pulse). WARNING: the doc's true two-counter / two-VCO-phase topology is NOT reproduced; this is the N/N+1 accumulator realization.

generated netlist

# div_prog_frac  —  UG572 Fig 3-1/3-24 fractional divider, 1/8 resolution. div_prog supplies the integer-divided clock O; a 3-bit phase accumulator (acc += FRAC each O edge) exposes its carry as FRAC_CARRY at the boundary (the +1/8 step pulse). WARNING: the doc's true two-counter / two-VCO-phase topology is NOT reproduced; this is the N/N+1 accumulator realization.
PORTS in: CLK, RST
PORTS out: O, FRAC_CARRY
INST intdiv  : div_prog  CLK=CLK RST=RST O=O
INST frac0   : cfgcell   Q=FRAC0
INST frac1   : cfgcell   Q=FRAC1
INST frac2   : cfgcell   Q=FRAC2
INST add0_s  : xor       A=acc0 B=FRAC0 O=sum0
INST add0_c  : and       A=acc0 B=FRAC0 O=c0
INST add1_xa : xor       A=acc1 B=FRAC1 O=s1a
INST add1_s  : xor       A=s1a B=c0 O=sum1
INST add1_ca : and       A=acc1 B=FRAC1 O=c1a
INST add1_cb : and       A=s1a B=c0 O=c1b
INST add1_co : or        A=c1a B=c1b O=c1
INST add2_xa : xor       A=acc2 B=FRAC2 O=s2a
INST add2_s  : xor       A=s2a B=c1 O=sum2
INST add2_ca : and       A=acc2 B=FRAC2 O=c2a
INST add2_cb : and       A=s2a B=c1 O=c2b
INST add2_co : or        A=c2a B=c2b O=FRAC_CARRY
INST acc0_ff : dff_d     D=sum0 CLK=O Q=acc0
INST acc1_ff : dff_d     D=sum1 CLK=O Q=acc1
INST acc2_ff : dff_d     D=sum2 CLK=O Q=acc2
NET  FRAC0 FRAC1 FRAC2 sum0 c0 s1a sum1 c1a c1b c1 s2a sum2 c2a c2b acc0 acc1 acc2

drp

 UG572 Fig 3-23

generated netlist

# drp  —  UG572 Fig 3-23
PORTS in: DCLK, DEN, DWE, DADDR[0], DADDR[1], DADDR[2], DADDR[3], DADDR[4], DADDR[5], DADDR[6], DI[0], DI[1], DI[2], DI[3], DI[4], DI[5], DI[6], DI[7], DI[8], DI[9], DI[10], DI[11], DI[12], DI[13], DI[14], DI[15]
PORTS out: DO[0], DO[1], DO[2], DO[3], DO[4], DO[5], DO[6], DO[7], DO[8], DO[9], DO[10], DO[11], DO[12], DO[13], DO[14], DO[15], DRDY

# MMCME4_ADV  —  MMCME4_ADV (35-port): clock_switch + MMCME4_BASE + DRP + phase_shift + CDDC handshake.
PORTS in: CLKIN1, CLKIN2, CLKFBIN, DCLK, PSCLK, RST, PWRDWN, CLKINSEL, DWE, DEN, PSINCDEC, PSEN, CDDCREQ, DADDR[0], DADDR[1], DADDR[2], DADDR[3], DADDR[4], DADDR[5], DADDR[6], DI[0], DI[1], DI[2], DI[3], DI[4], DI[5], DI[6], DI[7], DI[8], DI[9], DI[10], DI[11], DI[12], DI[13], DI[14], DI[15]
PORTS out: CLKOUT0, CLKOUT1, CLKOUT2, CLKOUT3, CLKOUT4, CLKOUT5, CLKOUT6, CLKOUT0B, CLKOUT1B, CLKOUT2B, CLKOUT3B, CLKFBOUT, CLKFBOUTB, LOCKED, DO[0], DO[1], DO[2], DO[3], DO[4], DO[5], DO[6], DO[7], DO[8], DO[9], DO[10], DO[11], DO[12], DO[13], DO[14], DO[15], DRDY, PSDONE, CLKINSTOPPED, CLKFBSTOPPED, CDDCDONE
INST cswitch : clock_switch CLKIN1=CLKIN1 CLKIN2=CLKIN2 CLKINSEL=CLKINSEL CLKFBIN=CLKFBIN CLKIN=clkin_sel CLKINSTOPPED=CLKINSTOPPED CLKFBSTOPPED=CLKFBSTOPPED
INST mmcm    : MMCME4_BASE CLKIN1=clkin_sel CLKFBIN=CLKFBIN RST=RST PWRDWN=PWRDWN CLKOUT0=CLKOUT0 CLKOUT1=CLKOUT1 CLKOUT2=CLKOUT2 CLKOUT3=CLKOUT3 CLKOUT4=CLKOUT4 CLKOUT5=CLKOUT5 CLKOUT6=CLKOUT6 CLKOUT0B=CLKOUT0B CLKOUT1B=CLKOUT1B CLKOUT2B=CLKOUT2B CLKOUT3B=CLKOUT3B CLKFBOUT=CLKFBOUT CLKFBOUTB=CLKFBOUTB LOCKED=LOCKED
INST drp     : drp       DCLK=DCLK DEN=DEN DWE=DWE DRDY=DRDY DADDR[0]=DADDR[0] DADDR[1]=DADDR[1] DADDR[2]=DADDR[2] DADDR[3]=DADDR[3] DADDR[4]=DADDR[4] DADDR[5]=DADDR[5] DADDR[6]=DADDR[6] DI[0]=DI[0] DI[1]=DI[1] DI[2]=DI[2] DI[3]=DI[3] DI[4]=DI[4] DI[5]=DI[5] DI[6]=DI[6] DI[7]=DI[7] DI[8]=DI[8] DI[9]=DI[9] DI[10]=DI[10] DI[11]=DI[11] DI[12]=DI[12] DI[13]=DI[13] DI[14]=DI[14] DI[15]=DI[15] DO[0]=DO[0] DO[1]=DO[1] DO[2]=DO[2] DO[3]=DO[3] DO[4]=DO[4] DO[5]=DO[5] DO[6]=DO[6] DO[7]=DO[7] DO[8]=DO[8] DO[9]=DO[9] DO[10]=DO[10] DO[11]=DO[11] DO[12]=DO[12] DO[13]=DO[13] DO[14]=DO[14] DO[15]=DO[15]
INST pshift  : phase_shift PSCLK=PSCLK PSEN=PSEN PSINCDEC=PSINCDEC PSDONE=PSDONE
INST cddc    : dff_d     D=CDDCREQ CLK=DCLK Q=CDDCDONE
NET  clkin_sel

phase_shift

 UG572 p43 dynamic phase shift. Models the PSEN->PSDONE handshake only. WARNING: the VCO 8-phase select mux and the full 12-cycle / 1-56 phase accumulator are simplified out; this is the rising-edge-detect + fixed-latency DONE pulse controller.

generated netlist

# phase_shift  —  UG572 p43 dynamic phase shift. Models the PSEN->PSDONE handshake only. WARNING: the VCO 8-phase select mux and the full 12-cycle / 1-56 phase accumulator are simplified out; this is the rising-edge-detect + fixed-latency DONE pulse controller.
PORTS in: PSCLK, PSEN, PSINCDEC
PORTS out: PSDONE
INST psen_ff : dff_d     D=PSEN CLK=PSCLK Q=psen_d
INST psen_inv: not       A=psen_d O=psen_dn
INST edge    : and       A=PSEN B=psen_dn O=start
INST lat0    : dff_d     D=start CLK=PSCLK Q=l0
INST lat1    : dff_d     D=l0 CLK=PSCLK Q=l1
INST lat2    : dff_d     D=l1 CLK=PSCLK Q=PSDONE
NET  psen_d psen_dn start l0 l1

PLLE4_ADV

 UG572 Table 3-10: PLLE4_ADV = PLLE4_BASE + DRP only.

generated netlist

# PLLE4_ADV  —  UG572 Table 3-10: PLLE4_ADV = PLLE4_BASE + DRP only.
PORTS in: CLKIN, CLKFBIN, RST, PWRDWN, CLKOUTPHYEN, DCLK, DEN, DWE, DADDR[0], DADDR[1], DADDR[2], DADDR[3], DADDR[4], DADDR[5], DADDR[6], DI[0], DI[1], DI[2], DI[3], DI[4], DI[5], DI[6], DI[7], DI[8], DI[9], DI[10], DI[11], DI[12], DI[13], DI[14], DI[15]
PORTS out: CLKOUT0, CLKOUT0B, CLKOUT1, CLKOUT1B, CLKFBOUT, CLKOUTPHY, LOCKED, DO[0], DO[1], DO[2], DO[3], DO[4], DO[5], DO[6], DO[7], DO[8], DO[9], DO[10], DO[11], DO[12], DO[13], DO[14], DO[15], DRDY
INST pll     : PLLE4_BASE CLKIN=CLKIN CLKFBIN=CLKFBIN RST=RST PWRDWN=PWRDWN CLKOUTPHYEN=CLKOUTPHYEN CLKOUT0=CLKOUT0 CLKOUT0B=CLKOUT0B CLKOUT1=CLKOUT1 CLKOUT1B=CLKOUT1B CLKFBOUT=CLKFBOUT CLKOUTPHY=CLKOUTPHY LOCKED=LOCKED
INST drp     : drp       DCLK=DCLK DEN=DEN DWE=DWE DRDY=DRDY DADDR[0]=DADDR[0] DADDR[1]=DADDR[1] DADDR[2]=DADDR[2] DADDR[3]=DADDR[3] DADDR[4]=DADDR[4] DADDR[5]=DADDR[5] DADDR[6]=DADDR[6] DI[0]=DI[0] DI[1]=DI[1] DI[2]=DI[2] DI[3]=DI[3] DI[4]=DI[4] DI[5]=DI[5] DI[6]=DI[6] DI[7]=DI[7] DI[8]=DI[8] DI[9]=DI[9] DI[10]=DI[10] DI[11]=DI[11] DI[12]=DI[12] DI[13]=DI[13] DI[14]=DI[14] DI[15]=DI[15] DO[0]=DO[0] DO[1]=DO[1] DO[2]=DO[2] DO[3]=DO[3] DO[4]=DO[4] DO[5]=DO[5] DO[6]=DO[6] DO[7]=DO[7] DO[8]=DO[8] DO[9]=DO[9] DO[10]=DO[10] DO[11]=DO[11] DO[12]=DO[12] DO[13]=DO[13] DO[14]=DO[14] DO[15]=DO[15]

ssc_modulator

 UG572 p63-71 spread spectrum clocking. ABSTRACT stub: ports only, decomposition pending. WARNING: triangular-ramp M-perturbation; the exact step / period / SS registers are NOT specified in UG572 (they live in XAPP888). Do not synthesize until the step math is sourced.

generated netlist

# ssc_modulator  —  UG572 p63-71 spread spectrum clocking. ABSTRACT stub: ports only, decomposition pending. WARNING: triangular-ramp M-perturbation; the exact step / period / SS registers are NOT specified in UG572 (they live in XAPP888). Do not synthesize until the step math is sourced.
PORTS in: CLK_MOD, RST, SS_EN, SS_MODE_CENTER, M_BASE[0], M_BASE[1], M_BASE[2], M_BASE[3], M_BASE[4], M_BASE[5], M_BASE[6]
PORTS out: M_EFF[0], M_EFF[1], M_EFF[2], M_EFF[3], M_EFF[4], M_EFF[5], M_EFF[6], RAMP[0], RAMP[1], RAMP[2], RAMP[3], RAMP[4], RAMP[5], RAMP[6], RAMP[7], DIR
# STUB — decomposition pending (ports declared from spec)
